title: burning effect
description: Adds an effect showing remaining burn time.
body:
Adds a simple Burning Effect that shows how much burn time the player has left.

![burning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba73c377c886f102ad9d93ffb5b24de755055394.png)

When the player catches fire, the effect is applied automatically, and its duration matches the remaining burn time.

The effect also works when applied using the /effect command.

The effect icon is animated in both the inventory GUI and the on-screen HUD.

<details>
<summary>Supported languages (the list may be updated)</summary>
  
- 🇺🇸 en_us English

- 🇷🇺 ru_ru Русский

- 🇩🇪 de_de Deutsch

- 🇫🇷 fr_fr Français

- 🇪🇸 es_es Español

- 🇧🇷 pt_br Português (Brasil)

- 🇨🇳 zh_cn 简体中文

- 🇯🇵 ja_jp 日本語

- 🇰🇷 ko_kr 한국어

- 🇵🇱 pl_pl Polski
</details>
